instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders FAQ sections from `sections`, each with `title` and `questions` (sequence of maps with `q` and `a`). Escape all text. Nest questions inside each section heading.
code:
<#-- Model: sections: sequence of { title, questions: [{ q, a }] } -->
<#list sections![] as section>

${section.title?html}

<#list section.questions![] as qa>
${qa.q?html}
${qa.a?html}
